basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Research Scientist I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 04-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. with at least three years of research experience or Ph.D. in the research area of stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology.
qualification.details: M.Sc. with at least three years of research experience or Ph.D. in the research area of stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SGPGIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I position is 04-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree with at least three years of research experience or a Ph.D. in stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, or molecular biology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the SGPGIMS Project Research Scientist I job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their application via email with all the required documents attached before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67200 per month, which includes Rs. 56000 plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist I.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at SGPGIMS.

faq.question: Q10. Where is SGPGIMS located?
faq.answer: SGPGIMS is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226014.
